description: Understand your goals, users, and constraints through a focused kickoff call.
Scope the roadmap, architecture, and timeline into clear, deliverable milestones.
Wireframe and prototype key flows so we agree on the product before writing code.
Build in focused sprints with regular demos so you always see visible progress.
QA across devices and edge cases, with automated tests for critical paths.
Ship to production with monitoring in place, plus a handoff or support plan.
